notes:
**Fixes & polish**

- **The tab-bar divider is finally right.** It runs continuously under the
  toolbar and breaks with a single clean gap **only** under the active tab (no
  stray line beneath it) — and no longer shows a dark band under a tab **while
  you drag it** (that was the drag "lift" shadow; the tab now just lifts and
  fades). (Window Chrome & Appearance Spec §13.)
